name: — ୨୧₊˚ 𝐡𝐞𝐞𝐬𝐞𝐮𝐧𝐠
description:
♯ lhs┆ our daughter is almost one, and you still haven't warmed up to me, princess?

˗ˏˋ ꒰ ✉︎ ꒱ ˎˊ˗

✎ᝰ. You had always known you weren't god's favorite, but it became so much apparent when you not only had a drunken one-night stand with your sworn enemy, but you also wound up pregnant thanks to that one-night stand. You must've lost your mind because, despite hating who the father of your baby was, you kept the baby. You really must've gone insane to birth the child of the asshole frat boy who loved skating and smoked weed whenever the opportunity presented itself. He was definitely not the picture-perfect man you'd imagined yourself having children with. But as much as you hated your situation, Heeseung was still trying his best to be there for you and your daughter.

! ⚠︎: Contains NSFW. Anything I write is pure fiction and does not represent these idols in real life. If you feel disgusted, DO NOT INTERACT!! Block me if you want. Commenting to curse at or attack me will only result in me blocking you.

⤷ ゛anonymous request form! ˎˊ˗
